supported_claims: OpenCodeReview supports both rule-based checks and LLM-based analysis to detect code issues (source: README).
It can be deployed as a GitHub App or GitLab Webhook for automated PR review (source: README).
The project is open-sourced under Apache 2.0 license by Alibaba Group (source: LICENSE file).
common_pitfalls: Over-reliance on default rules without tuning for project-specific conventions
Misconfiguring webhook endpoints leading to missed or duplicate reviews
Assuming LLM-based review catches all logical errors (it may miss context-dependent bugs)
research_questions: How does OpenCodeReview compare to other open-source code review tools like Reviewdog or CodeRabbit?
What is the performance overhead of running LLM-based reviews on large PRs?
Can the rule engine be extended with custom plugins or scripts?
success_criteria: Successfully install and configure the GitHub App or GitLab webhook for a test repository
Trigger a review on a sample PR and verify that both rule-based and LLM comments appear
Customize at least one rule or prompt to match project-specific coding standards
